title: testworkflow-author JSON authoring request
description: Optional structured input for the testworkflow-author skill. Only used when the caller opts into JSON input; the default free-form-prose input is unaffected. Field shape is compatible with a test-discovery suites[] entry so that skill's output can be piped in.

workflowName.description: metadata.name for the generated TestWorkflow. If omitted, derive one from framework + workingDir.

framework.description: Test framework/runner, e.g. playwright, cypress, jest, vitest, k6, go-test, go-testify, pytest, maven-surefire, gradle-test, postman, jmeter, artillery.

language.description: Primary language of the tests (informational; used to pick default image when image is absent).

workingDir.description: Directory where the test code lives; maps to spec.container.workingDir.

content.description: Where test code comes from; maps to spec.content. Either git or files.

image.description: Container image for steps. If omitted, resolve from the framework + lock-file version per the skill Rules.

installCommand.description: Dependency install command run in its own step (e.g. npm ci). Null when the framework needs none.

testCommand.description: Command that runs the tests. If omitted, use the framework's canonical default (never invent one).

envVars.description: Env var NAMES the tests reference (no values). Values, if secret, are handled via credential()/secretKeyRef.

artifacts.description: Glob paths to collect as artifacts; maps to an artifacts step with condition: always.
